title: Schema Evolution (AVRO/Protobuf)
description: Architect effective schema evolution strategies for data serialization formats like AVRO and Protobuf. Implement forward and backward compatibility using a Schema Registry to prevent "Poison Pill" events from disrupting downstream consumers.
objectives: Architect effective schema evolution strategies for data serialization formats like AVRO and Protobuf.
Implement forward and backward compatibility using a Schema Registry to prevent "Poison Pill" events from disrupting downstream consumers.
